subject: fix(theme): restore functional colors and fix hover/comment issues
body:
Found during code review of the branch:
- Restored --color-secondary (#a3a3a3) and --color-accent (#4ade80) in
  theme — these are functional colors used by DebugBanner (severity/source
  labels) and InterestForm (success state). Removing them broke those UIs.
- Fixed project card hover: was hover:border-border (no-op, same as
  resting state). Now hover:border-text-muted/40 for subtle feedback.
- Updated stale comments in embed.ts that referenced old color values.

Tags: styling, bugfix, theme, debug, form
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-redesign
Semver: patch
